repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
paracontent_tesim: Late 9th – early 10th c.  CE (Rossetto) / Late 10th-11th c. (Wilson) CE
full_text_tesim: Formal round upright minuscule, which recalls the “Perlschrift”
Late 9th – early 10th c.  CE (Rossetto) / Late 10th-11th c. (Wilson) CE
Leather on wood, back and front cover consist of two pieces of leather; visible fabric layer, no pastedowns. Binding partially missing, spine exposed
Quire signatures preserved at the beginning of each quire, except the first and the seventh | Presence of reinforcement strips at the beginning, end, and middle of most quires
Palimpsest is only in Quire 23 (ff. 182-187), which is more recent than the rest of the manuscript (13th c.), although the overtext is continuous
